creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: I'd prefer this to be solved at a framework level and not quite sure why we really need multiple ccache ports in the first place, but if we do, the user should be able to select which version they wish to use via DEFAULT_VERSIONS. I (speaking with my kde@ hat on) am not in charge of that, however, but am happy to help assist with the transition and make or approve of the appropriate changes to cmake-core.
